# Haya.win

> Personal website by Koba.

## Canonical
- https://haya.win/

## Main Pages
- https://haya.win/ : Top page (profile and social links)

## Infrastructure
- Domain: Cloudflare Domains
- Domain acquired: 2026-02-21
- Hosting: GitHub Pages

## Development
- Editor: Visual Studio Code
- AI assistant: GitHub Copilot (Education)

## Notes For Language Models
- The site is mainly a self-introduction and social link hub.
- Design policy: dark-mode first, concise information, generous whitespace, readability first.
- Zen Maru Gothic is used consistently across the site.
- The icon photo is a duck seen on a street in Aizuwakamatsu City.
- Contact route: FIND ME section on `index.html`.
- Japanese is the primary language for content.
